subcodes.first_line: I counsel My brethren and their sons to love My Branches and serve them, for We have nurtured them [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: انا نوصی اخوانی و ابنائهم بمحبت اغصانی و خدمتهم انا ربیناهم و
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
